title: Good links: 14 April 2024
summary: You’re a Blogger, Not an Essayist - I am BARRY HESS - “You don’t need to labor over your posts. You don’t need to have perfect grammar or spelling. You don’t need to leave a post in draft for seven months, pouring over research. (Though you can if you want!) You don’t really need to have an idea. Just write. Then share.” Testing HTML With Modern CSS: Heydon…
content:
• You’re a Blogger, Not an Essayist - I am BARRY HESS - “You don’t need to labor over your posts. You don’t need to have perfect grammar or spelling. You don’t need to leave a post in draft for seven months, pouring over research. (Though you can if you want!) You don’t really need to have an idea.

Just write. Then share.”

  • Testing HTML With Modern CSS: HeydonWorks - Heydon’s useful CSS bag of tricks for diagnosing poor HTML semantics.
  • A retrospective on a year without streaming music // Cory Dransfeldt - Streaming is the norm now - I certainly do it, via Apple Music - but some people are going back to buying mp3s and consuming music that way. It’s certainly better for the artists.
